---
title: "COVID LMR — Analysis (Results Section 4: Phases, Arms & Sample Sizes)"
output: html_document
---

# Section 4 — Phases, arms, and sample sizes

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(tidytext)
library(gridExtra)

# ---- Paths ----
in_dir    <- "../data/final"
plots_dir <- "../plots"
if (!dir.exists(plots_dir)) dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- Helper functions (defined unconditionally) ----
clean_id <- function(x) str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
parse_dmy_safe <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "na", "n/a", "unknown", "-99")] <- NA
  suppressWarnings(dmy(x))
}

# ---- Load data (if not already in session from earlier scripts) ----
if (!exists("study_table")) {
  rdata_in <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^covid_lmr_clean7_\\d{8}\\.RData$", full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(rdata_in) >= 1)
  rdata_in <- rdata_in[which.max(file.info(rdata_in)$mtime)]
  load(rdata_in)

  study_table   <- study_table   %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  pharma_table  <- pharma_table  %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  country_table <- country_table %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
  arm_table     <- arm_table     %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id))
}

# ---- Colour palettes ----
drug_cat_colors <- c(
  "Antimalarials"                = "mistyrose4",
  "Antivirals (repurposed)"      = "deepskyblue4",
  "Antivirals (direct-acting)"   = "deepskyblue3",
  "Corticosteroids"              = "#F58518",
  "Immunomodulators"             = "indianred3",
  "Antibody Therapies"           = "lightcoral",
  "Anticoagulants"               = "palegreen4",
  "Antibiotics / Antiparasitics" = "pink4",
  "Anti-inflammatories"          = "lightgoldenrod",
  "Metabolic agents"             = "#9D755D",
  "Supportive Care"              = "#D3D3D3",
  "Other/Unspecified"            = "#BEBEBE"
)

col_confirm <- "#cd5c5c"   # Indian Red — confirmatory
col_explore <- "#4682b4"   # Steel Blue — exploratory
col_unspec  <- "#d3d3d3"   # Light grey — unspecified

# ---- Themes (consistent with 03_results_s1s2.Rmd and 04_results_s3.Rmd) ----
theme_stacked <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text               = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title         = element_text(size = base_size + 4, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = base_size, color = "#666666"),
      axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position    = "top",
      legend.direction   = "horizontal",
      legend.justification = "center",
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "#f9f9f9", color = NA),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E1E5E9", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      plot.margin        = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
    )
}

theme_bar <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text               = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 6), color = "#666666"),
      axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "#444444"),
      axis.ticks         = element_line(color = "#444444", linewidth = 0.25),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.title       = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.text        = element_text(size = base_size - 2),
      legend.key.size    = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 12, 12, 12)
    )
}

# ---- Cohort with era and phase classification ----
cohort <- study_table %>%
  mutate(
    era = case_when(
      reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
      reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
      TRUE                             ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
    ),
    phase_clean = case_when(
      st_phase == "phase 1"                   ~ "Phase 1",
      st_phase == "phase 2"                   ~ "Phase 2",
      st_phase == "phase 1,phase 2"           ~ "Phase 1/2",
      st_phase == "phase 0"                   ~ "Phase 1",
      st_phase == "phase 3"                   ~ "Phase 3",
      st_phase == "phase 4"                   ~ "Phase 4",
      st_phase == "phase 3,phase 4"           ~ "Phase 3/4",
      st_phase == "phase 2,phase 3"           ~ "Phase 2/3",
      st_phase == "phase 1,phase 2,phase 3"   ~ "Phase 2/3",
      st_phase == "phase 2,phase 3,phase 4"   ~ "Phase 3/4",
      st_phase == "phase 2,phase 4"           ~ "Phase 2/3",
      st_phase == "not applicable"            ~ "Not applicable",
      st_phase == "phase 4,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 4",
      st_phase == "phase 2,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 2",
      st_phase == "phase 3,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 3",
      st_phase == "phase 3,unknown"           ~ "Phase 3",
      st_phase == "phase 2,unknown"           ~ "Phase 2",
      st_phase == "not applicable,unknown"    ~ "Not applicable"
    ),
    phase_category = case_when(
      phase_clean %in% c("Phase 1", "Phase 2", "Phase 1/2")           ~ "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)",
      phase_clean %in% c("Phase 3", "Phase 4", "Phase 3/4", "Phase 2/3") ~ "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)",
      phase_clean == "Not applicable"                                  ~ "Unspecified",
      TRUE                                                             ~ "Unspecified"
    ),
    phase_category = factor(phase_category, levels = c(
      "Unspecified", "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)", "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"
    ))
  )
```

## Figure 4.1 — Phase composition by half-year

```{r fig41_phase_halfyear, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_data_half <- cohort %>%
  mutate(half_year = paste0(year(reg_date), " H", semester(reg_date))) %>%
  filter(reg_date >= "2020-01-01", reg_date <= "2025-12-31") %>%
  count(half_year, phase_category) %>%
  group_by(half_year) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n), total_n = sum(n))

p1 <- ggplot(plot_data_half, aes(x = half_year, y = pct, fill = phase_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = plot_data_half %>% select(half_year, total_n) %>% distinct(),
            aes(x = half_year, y = 1.05, label = paste0("N=", total_n), fill = NULL),
            color = "grey20", size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Unspecified"              = col_unspec,
    "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)" = col_confirm,
    "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"  = col_explore
  )) +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 4.1. Phase composition of COVID-19 trials (half-yearly 2020–2025)",
    subtitle = "Proportion of trials by phase; total registered trials (N) at top",
    x = NULL, y = "Proportion of new trials", fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_stacked(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig41_phase_by_halfyear.png"), p1, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p1
```

## Figure 4.2 — Phase composition by era

```{r fig42_phase_era, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fig3_2_data <- cohort %>%
  filter(!is.na(phase_category)) %>%
  count(era, phase_category) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n), total_n = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(era = factor(era, levels = c(
    "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  )))

era_totals <- fig3_2_data %>% select(era, total_n) %>% distinct()

fig3_2 <- ggplot(fig3_2_data, aes(x = era, y = pct, fill = phase_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            colour = "white", size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = era_totals,
            aes(x = era, y = 1.06, label = paste0("N=", total_n), fill = NULL),
            colour = "black", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)" = col_confirm,
    "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"  = col_explore,
    "Unspecified"              = col_unspec
  )) +
  labs(title = "Figure 4.2. Confirmatory trial share fell from 49% to 30% post-PHEIC",
       x = NULL, y = "Proportion of trials", fill = NULL) +
  theme_stacked(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_flip()

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig42_phase_by_era.png"), fig3_2, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig3_2
```

## Figure 4.3 — Top drugs by era and WHO evidence status

```{r fig43_drugs_era, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
discredited_drugs <- c(
  "hydroxychloroquine", "azithromycin", "lopinavir/ritonavir",
  "ivermectin", "favipiravir", "chloroquine"
)

novel_drugs_vec <- c(
  "ritonavir (boosted, unspecified)", "molnupiravir", "azvudine",
  "metformin", "protease inhibitors unknown/not on list",
  "monoclonal antibodies unknown/not on list"
)

drug_era <- drugcat_plot %>%
  left_join(cohort %>% select(st_reg_id, era), by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(drug_std), !is.na(era)) %>%
  mutate(who_status = case_when(
    drug_std %in% discredited_drugs ~ "WHO rec. against",
    drug_std %in% novel_drugs_vec   ~ "Novel / emerging",
    TRUE                            ~ "Other"
  ))

drug_era %>% count(era)

top10_per_era <- drug_era %>%
  count(era, drug_std, who_status, display_group, sort = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(era = factor(era, levels = c(
    "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  ))) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(drug_std = reorder_within(drug_std, n, era))

fig3_3 <- ggplot(top10_per_era, aes(x = n, y = drug_std, fill = who_status)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  facet_wrap(~ era, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "WHO rec. against" = col_confirm,
    "Novel / emerging" = col_explore,
    "Other"            = "#aab4c8"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 4.3. Discredited drugs persisted across all eras (top 20 per era)",
    x = "Number of trials", y = NULL, fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_stacked(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9)
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig43_drugs_by_era.png"), fig3_3, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig3_3
```

## Figure 4.4 — Trial arm complexity by era

```{r fig44_arms_era, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cohort_arms <- cohort %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample), st_sample > 0) %>%
  mutate(arm_category = case_when(
    st_intv_arms == 2 ~ "2 Arms",
    st_intv_arms == 3 ~ "3 Arms",
    st_intv_arms >= 4 ~ "4+ Arms",
    TRUE              ~ "Single Arm / Other"
  )) %>%
  filter(arm_category != "Single Arm / Other")

cat("Explicit arms dataset: N =", nrow(cohort_arms), "\n")
cohort_arms %>% count(arm_category) %>% print()

plot_data_arms <- cohort_arms %>%
  count(era, arm_category) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(total_n = sum(n), pct = n / total_n) %>%
  ungroup()

fig4_2 <- ggplot(plot_data_arms, aes(y = era, x = pct, fill = arm_category)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = plot_data_arms %>% distinct(era, total_n),
            aes(x = 1.03, y = era, label = paste0("N=", total_n)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", size = 4.2, fontface = "bold", hjust = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("2 Arms" = "#4D4D4D", "3 Arms" = "#2E86C1", "4+ Arms" = "#C0392B")) +
  labs(title = "Figure 4.4. Trial arm complexity by era",
       x = "Share of all multi-arm trials", y = "Registration period") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 12)
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig44_arm_complexity_by_era.png"), fig4_2, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
fig4_2
```

## Figure 4.5 — Arm complexity over time (half-yearly)

```{r fig45_arms_time, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_data_arms_v2 <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
    time_label = case_when(
      year(reg_date) >= 2024 ~ as.character(year(reg_date)),
      TRUE                   ~ paste0(year(reg_date), " H", semester(reg_date))
    ),
    sort_date = case_when(
      year(reg_date) >= 2024 ~ floor_date(reg_date, "year"),
      TRUE                   ~ floor_date(reg_date, "halfyear")
    ),
    arm_category = case_when(
      st_intv_arms == 2 ~ "2 Arms (Standard)",
      st_intv_arms == 3 ~ "3 Arms",
      st_intv_arms >= 4 ~ "4+ Arms (Multi-Arm)",
      TRUE              ~ "Single Arm / Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(arm_category != "Single Arm / Other") %>%
  count(sort_date, time_label, arm_category) %>%
  group_by(sort_date, time_label) %>%
  mutate(total_n = sum(n), pct = n / total_n) %>%
  filter(time_label != "NA HNA")

p6 <- ggplot(plot_data_arms_v2, aes(x = reorder(time_label, sort_date), y = pct, fill = arm_category)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "white", size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = plot_data_arms_v2 %>% select(time_label, sort_date, total_n) %>% distinct(),
            aes(x = time_label, y = 1.05, label = total_n, fill = NULL),
            color = "black", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "2 Arms (Standard)"   = "#999999",
    "3 Arms"              = "#377eb8",
    "4+ Arms (Multi-Arm)" = "#e41a1c"
  )) +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 4.5. Evolution of trial complexity",
    subtitle = "Number of trials by intervention arms (total count at top)",
    x = NULL, y = "Proportion of registered trials", fill = "Trial design"
  ) +
  theme_stacked(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig45_arm_complexity_over_time.png"), p6, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p6
```

## Figure 4.6 — Sample size per arm by phase and intervention category

```{r fig46_sample_phase_category, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_data_scatter <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(!is.na(reg_date), !is.na(arm_n_planned), arm_n_planned > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    st_phase     = ifelse(is.na(st_phase), "Unknown", st_phase),
    phase_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(display_group != "Other", phase_simple != "Other")

if (nrow(plot_data_scatter) == 0) stop("Data is empty after filtering! Check join or regex.")

plot_data_clean <- plot_data_scatter %>%
  mutate(era = case_when(
    reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    TRUE                             ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  )) %>%
  filter(display_group != "Supportive Care") %>%
  group_by(era, phase_simple, display_group) %>%
  filter(n() >= 3) %>%
  ungroup()

n_labels <- plot_data_clean %>%
  group_by(era, display_group, phase_simple) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(y_pos = 1, phase_label = paste0("n=", n))

p10_exploratory <- plot_data_clean %>%
  filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = arm_n_planned, y = display_group, fill = phase_simple)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = 1, outlier.size = 1, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"),
            aes(x = y_pos, label = phase_label),
            hjust = 1, size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(100, 500), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()), limits = c(0.8, NA)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_explore) +
  labs(title = "Figure 4.6a. Exploratory trials (Phase 1/2)",
       subtitle = "Sample size per arm (n ≥ 3 categories only)",
       x = "Sample size per arm (log10)", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_bar(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

p10_confirmatory <- plot_data_clean %>%
  filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = arm_n_planned, y = display_group, fill = phase_simple)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = 1, outlier.size = 1, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"),
            aes(x = y_pos, label = phase_label),
            hjust = 1, size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(100, 500), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()), limits = c(0.8, NA)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_confirm) +
  labs(title = "Figure 4.6b. Confirmatory trials (Phase 3/4)",
       subtitle = "Sample size per arm (n ≥ 3 categories only)",
       x = "Sample size per arm (log10)", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_bar(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig46a_sample_exploratory.png"),   p10_exploratory, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig46b_sample_confirmatory.png"),  p10_confirmatory, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p10_exploratory
p10_confirmatory
```

## Figure 4.7 — Phase trial size distributions by year

```{r fig47_phase_size_by_year, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_data_raw <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
    year           = year(reg_date),
    st_sample_clean = as.numeric(str_remove_all(as.character(st_sample), "[,a-zA-Z]")),
    phase_simple   = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample_clean), st_sample_clean > 0, phase_simple != "Other")

n_labels <- plot_data_raw %>%
  group_by(year, phase_simple) %>%
  summarise(
    n     = n(),
    y_pos = quantile(st_sample_clean, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.5,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p1_box <- ggplot(plot_data_raw %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"),
       aes(x = factor(year), y = st_sample_clean)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = col_explore, alpha = 0.2, outlier.color = col_explore, outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"),
            aes(x = factor(year), y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
            vjust = 0, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.6, y = 110, label = "Target (100)", hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "grey50") +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 4.7A. Phase 1/2 trial size distributions",
       subtitle = "Boxplots showing median, IQR, and outliers. 'n=' indicates total trials.",
       x = NULL, y = "Sample size (log scale)") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 14)

p2_box <- ggplot(plot_data_raw %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"),
       aes(x = factor(year), y = st_sample_clean)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = col_confirm, alpha = 0.2, outlier.color = col_confirm, outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"),
            aes(x = factor(year), y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
            vjust = 0, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.6, y = 550, label = "Target (500)", hjust = 0, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(title    = "Figure 4.7B. Phase 3/4 trial size distributions",
       subtitle = "Boxplots showing median, IQR, and outliers. 'n=' indicates total trials.",
       x = NULL, y = "Sample size (log scale)") +
  theme_bar(base_size = 14)

print(p1_box)
print(p2_box)
```
